items.name_en: Elegant yet casual, beautiful and free-spirited, perfectly combined
items.name_cn: Elegant yet casual, beautiful and free-spirited, perfectly combined

specs.rawTitle: Elegant yet casual, beautiful and free-spirited, perfectly combined

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
SERPENTI FOREVER Medium Tote, made of calf leather with sheepskin lining. It skillfully blends classic design with modern style, fully showcasing the endless charm of the collection. This easy-to-wear bag incorporates new details into iconic elements, featuring a leather shoulder strap and a signature snake-head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection. It features a compartment, a front pocket, an external back zip pocket, an internal open pocket, and a mirror pouch with a customizable mirror. The back is adorned with a BVLGARI metal logo.
Style: 293665
Size: 20.5 X 15 X 9

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
SERPENTI FOREVER Mini Tote, crafted from calfskin, combining a modern look with practical wearability for a stylish look. The piece features a serpent chain and leather shoulder strap, accented with the iconic serpent head magnetic clasp, drawing inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection. It is equipped with a compartment, a front pocket, an external back patch pocket, an internal open pocket, and an internal mirror pouch with a customizable vanity mirror, with a BVLGARI metal logo on the back.
Style: 293666
Size: 19 X 11 X 6
